item.title: Small Dog Meet Up (Everyone gets LUCKY with Two Small Dog Meet Ups this month!)
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Small Dog Meet Up (Everyone gets LUCKY with Two Small Dog Meet Ups this month!) All dogs 19lbs and under are welcome! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_e6612c19f72f4125b0d2b8b8f21cf148~mv2.jpg More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/small-dog-meet-up-everyone-gets-lucky-with-two-small-dog-meet-ups-this-month

From Dogwood Play Park Events

Event details

item.title: Samoyed Meet-Up
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Samoyed Meet-Up This is a meet-up for Samoyeds! Got a cute, fluffy cloud for a dog? Come meet all of the other Seattle Samoyeds! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_4f085a3e4e4048588e19ce7399bb609b~mv2.jpg More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/samoyed-meet-up-7

item.title: Husky & Malamute Meet Up
item.description:
Saturday, April 25, 2026 at 5:30 PM

item.title: Golden Retriever Meet Up
item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Golden Retriever Meet Up This is a breed specific meet up for GOLDENS! Join us for a fun morning of play time! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_60c0121532494f55a638fd013b0d7d4a~mv2.jpg More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/golden-retriever-meet-up-29

item.title: Fi Collar FOAM PARTY! Save the date!
item.description:
Saturday, July 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Dogwood Play Park, 12568 33rd Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98125, USA

Fi Collar FOAM PARTY! Save the date! Details to come for our 2nd annual Fi Collar sponsored FOAM party! Dogwood Play Park is Seattle's indoor/outdoor off-leash dog park and bar! Event image: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/037af7_c412597894d941ba9206af21de68e1ed~mv2.jpg More information: https://www.dogwoodplaypark.com/event-details/fi-collar-foam-party-save-the-date
